error_signature: Using the item method doesn’t work with pinned data
title: Item method fails with pinned data in Code node
symptom: When trying to reference data points after filtering in a Code node, n8n throws an error about the item method not working with pinned data.
root_cause: The item method in n8n's Code node cannot resolve the correct item when data is pinned after filtering. This leads to confusion in referencing specific data points from previous nodes.
fix_steps: Unpin the data in the Code node
Use the pairedItem method to reference the required data
Test the workflow to ensure data points are accessible
agent_instruction: Unpin the data and use the pairedItem method to access previous node data.
